TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kaangican a luma' (nu Hulam a kamu: ŚíÜŚďģŚĪĪŤéä) kakungkuan kunku nina cudad itini i sabaw tu walu (18) a seci nu Ing-kelan amis a ye-ke'cun a niyaduan, namakaydaay i tukaya a sining ci Luo-ke-wude mi'suyi tu lanulanuan a hua-mey tien-cun , mididaw cinida tu silumaay a tademaw ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu an, maadih nida ku ni culimekan i labu nu kaangican a luma a kawaan: kaangican a luma nu naayaway a silumaay a tawki ci Law-En-sia (ŤÄĀśĀ©ŤāĖ Earnshaw) kina cacay tayda i Li-wu-pu mikawaw, patalumaen nida ku cacaya caay kaw kakatinengan a tatamaan a tademaw ci CI-pu-say a wawaan, pangangan han nida ci Si-se-keli (ŚłĆśĖĮŚÖčťáĆŚ§ę Heathcliff). (Hindley) . ina tatamaan a wawa alawen nida ku tawki nu namuh i sakakaay nida wawa ci Sin-de-la (ŤĺõŚĺ∑ťõ∑ Hindley) atu tataynaan a wawa ci Kay-se'-lin tu bulah, hamaw sa kalingesan ni Sin-de-la , nika masasungaay cinida atu ci Kay-se'-lin . mapatay satu ci Law-En-sia , ci Sin-de-la atu acawa nida ci Falan-sise miduduc tina luma'an , mangalay paculi, pala kalungen nida ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu , sawni sawacuen nida. ci Kay-se'-lin amica kuni ka namuh ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu an, nika mangalay cinida paka adih tu katuuday caay pisainai cinidaan, siacawa satu cinida tu siidaay a tademaw, malakapahay a hua-mey tien-cun a tawki ci Ay-de-cia.Lin-tun (śĄõŚĺ∑Śä†¬∑śěóť†ď Edgar Linton), ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu i kabalangbangan udaudadan nu labii malinges cinida liyasa tu. tulu satu amihcaan, ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu tayniaca i kaangican a luma' ,mala kakitaan tu u siidaay tu a tademaw cinida, pabalucu cinida mangalay misawacu miedis ci Sin-de-la atu mialaway tu kanamuhan numaku a tademaw ci Ay-de-cia an. sayaway hanipipakiyawen nida ku kawaw sapialaw tu zaysang ni Sin-de-la atu kaangican a luma' , pahabayan nida ku wawa ni Sin-de-la pala makatalay a tademaw, sainaiay nu laheci a kalungan nu tademaw. satu, pacebaan nida ku saba ni Ay-de-cia ci E-sa-bey-la Isabella) masungay milaliw, pakalinges ci Lin-tun nan amalekaka tu nika caay kasasukapah. ci Ay-de-cia atu ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu tuni kasasuada'an mangalepmangalep, utiih satu ku balucu' ni Kay-se'-lin , tada adada tu ku balucu' nida sadikuday mulecuh satu wawa cinida patay satu ipilecuhan, lutungay satu ci adidi'ay Kay-se'-lin ku maudipay. ci E-sa-bey-la namikikung satu caay pakadungdung tunipi sawaan, milaliw taydan nida i tukay mulecuh tu tatamaan a wawa ci Lin-tun nan. ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu caay kadem, pacicien nida ci Ay-de-cia papatahekal tu ci E-sa-bey-la a wawa nida ci Lin-tun nan, sadikuday satu pacicien nida ku tataynaan a wawa ci adidiay Kay-se'-lin pakasiacawa tu malawacuay nu udipan ci Lin-tun nan. caay katenes mapatay nu imelang ci Ay-de-cia , u zaysang atu hua-mey tien-cun mala wawa tu nu malekakaay ku zaysang ci Lin-tun na, caay ka tenes mapatay tu ci Lin-tun , sadikuday satu zaysan tayda tu ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu an, ci adidiay Kay-se'-lin pulul han tu i kaangican a luma' an. ma'dem tu namidis, nika u balucu nida mahicaay aniuyu, kutkuten nida ku lunem ni Kay-se'-lin , mangalay malaledi' tu atu cinida, sadikuday satu caay tu kan caay tu nanum, mapaty nu ngalay patay satu. yu amapaty cinida, ku mitaneng cinida mipulu' tu ci adidi'ay Kay-se'-lin atu ci Ha-li-tun tuni kasasumidangan. nika ina tatusaay nika sasungaayan mahemek cinida, ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu makayda i udip nida makaadih tu udip nida atu ci Kay-se'-lin a adingu. ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu mapatay satu, ci adidiay Kay-se'-lin atu ci Ha-li-tun milaylay tu buyu a luma' atu umah a luma' a kawawan, nu naayaway caay kaw kapahay ani ka sasungayan itini nu aydaay pakae'demen ku nuheni. patinsuan "kaangican a luma' "kasilaculan nu kapahay a aadihan tu cudad, itini nalimaan, mipulung tu aydaay a kawaw , nikasasumidangan a kawaw , kala tatetatengaan a kawaw tuililisay nu nalimaan. dumasatu saciwaciwaliw biyalaw sa kina kakunkuan, nipatiden tu tademaw, mahida nu mita ku Ingkuo niyaduay anikaudip, sasungaay nu taleacawaan, tawyaay nu cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa (19) a secian nu picidekan a likisi, miliyas tu tukay nu luma anikaudip namaka hekalay anika calilawan. tawya, nina cuda nikaydaan tu nalimaan anisulitan, sangangiwngangiw han kinipipatahekal tu caculimekan tu "nipibelih tu sakay luma' " , mahida u hua-mey tien-cun nu mikai i tawan atu caay pilihida i tawan, kaangican a luma' malalibet nikanaian nu zunziw. dumasa tu, cudad miala tu yadahay nu nalimaan a kawaw, tahsepi hananay nu kawaw, pakunida sananay anipaadihan sa. i tini nu kakunkuan nu cudad, misuayaw tu lihalay ni sulitan idaw ku sakaetiman a kawawan, misulitay a tademaw misulit tu picidekan a balucu nu wayway, namaka balucuay a lawlaw atu hekal anika balangbangan nipisulitan, patahekal tu tademaw atu lihalay nu kalalitemuhan. nina kunku han misuayaw tu cudad anipisulitan tu masasungaaya a kawawan, patahekal tu bangcalay a niyaduay a kulitan. aniwyuan nu lanulanuan a dihep, balihnawan nu tunduh a buyu, kapelpelan nu bali atu udad nu hekal, cuedetay a bali, atekakay nu lala', wayway pakatineng tu aniwyu tu lalum nu picidekan a katalawan a edes nu lunmuwa. . itini i cuda, lihalay nu hekal u sakay tatayna atu tatama nu sapilaliwan tu adada' nu kataydaan a hahinangan, atu caayan kasasuadih nu luma, mipenec tu lihalay a waywayan nu kapahay anika sasuayawan. namakayiniay a nasulitan
S.PHON: kaaŇči ¶an a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° (nu ńßur~…ĺam a kamu: ****) kakuŇčkuan kunku nina ¶udad itini i sabaw tu war~…ĺu (**) a s…ô ¶i nu iŇč-k…ôr~…ĺan amis a j…ô-k…ô Ē~ ° ¶un a nijaduan, namakajdaaj i tukaja a siniŇč ¶i r~…ĺuo-k…ô-wud…ô mi Ē~ °suji tu r~…ĺanur~…ĺanuan a ńßua-m…ô ti…ôn- ¶un , mididaw ¶inida tu sir~…ĺumaaj a tad…ômaw ¶i si-s…ô-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-ńßu an, maadińß nida ku ni ¶ur~…ĺim…ôkan i r~…ĺabu nu kaaŇči ¶an a r~…ĺuma a kawaan: kaaŇči ¶an a r~…ĺuma nu naajawaj a sir~…ĺumaaj a tawki ¶i r~…ĺaw-…ôn-sia (*** …ôarnsńßaw) kina ¶a ¶aj tajda i r~…ĺi-wu-pu mikawaw, patar~…ĺuma…ôn nida ku ¶a ¶aja ¶aaj kaw kakatin…ôŇčan a tatamaan a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶i-pu-saj a wawaan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan nida ¶i si-s…ô-k…ôr~…ĺi (***** ńß…ôatńß ¶r~…ĺiff). (ńßindr~…ĺ…ô) . ina tatamaan a wawa ar~…ĺaw…ôn nida ku tawki nu namuńß i sakakaaj nida wawa ¶i sin-d…ô-r~…ĺa (*** ńßindr~…ĺ…ô) atu tatajnaan a wawa ¶i kaj-s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺin tu bur~…ĺańß, ńßamaw sa kar~…ĺiŇč…ôsan ni sin-d…ô-r~…ĺa , nika masasuŇčaaj ¶inida atu ¶i kaj-s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺin . mapataj satu ¶i r~…ĺaw-…ôn-sia , ¶i sin-d…ô-r~…ĺa atu a ¶awa nida ¶i far~…ĺan-sis…ô midudu ¶ tina r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an , maŇčar~…ĺaj pa ¶ur~…ĺi, par~…ĺa kar~…ĺuŇč…ôn nida ¶i si-s…ô-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-ńßu , sawni sawa ¶u…ôn nida. ¶i kaj-s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺin ami ¶a kuni ka namuńß ¶i si-s…ô-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-ńßu an, nika maŇčar~…ĺaj ¶inida paka adińß tu katuudaj ¶aaj pisainai ¶inidaan, sia ¶awa satu ¶inida tu siidaaj a tad…ômaw, mar~…ĺakapańßaj a ńßua-m…ô ti…ôn- ¶un a tawki ¶i aj-d…ô- ¶ia.r~…ĺin-tun (****** …ôdgar r~…ĺinton), ¶i si-s…ô-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-ńßu i kabar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan udaudadan nu r~…ĺabii mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs ¶inida r~…ĺijasa tu. tur~…ĺu satu amińß ¶aan, ¶i si-s…ô-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-ńßu tajnia ¶a i kaaŇči ¶an a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ,mar~…ĺa kakitaan tu u siidaaj tu a tad…ômaw ¶inida, pabar~…ĺu ¶u ¶inida maŇčar~…ĺaj misawa ¶u mi…ôdis ¶i sin-d…ô-r~…ĺa atu miar~…ĺawaj tu kanamuńßan numaku a tad…ômaw ¶i aj-d…ô- ¶ia an. sajawaj ńßanipipakijaw…ôn nida ku kawaw sapiar~…ĺaw tu zajsaŇč ni sin-d…ô-r~…ĺa atu kaaŇči ¶an a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° , pańßabajan nida ku wawa ni sin-d…ô-r~…ĺa par~…ĺa makatar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw, sainaiaj nu r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i a kar~…ĺuŇčan nu tad…ômaw. satu, pa ¶…ôbaan nida ku saba ni aj-d…ô- ¶ia ¶i …ô-sa-b…ô-r~…ĺa isab…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺa) masuŇčaj mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw, pakar~…ĺiŇč…ôs ¶i r~…ĺin-tun nan amar~…ĺ…ôkaka tu nika ¶aaj kasasukapańß. ¶i aj-d…ô- ¶ia atu ¶i si-s…ô-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-ńßu tuni kasasuada Ē~ °an maŇčar~…ĺ…ôpmaŇčar~…ĺ…ôp, utiińß satu ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ni kaj-s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺin , tada adada tu ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nida sadikudaj mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß satu wawa ¶inida pataj satu ipir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, r~…ĺutuŇčaj satu ¶i adidi Ē~ °aj kaj-s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺin ku maudipaj. ¶i …ô-sa-b…ô-r~…ĺa namikikuŇč satu ¶aaj pakaduŇčduŇč tunipi sawaan, mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tajdan nida i tukaj mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß tu tatamaan a wawa ¶i r~…ĺin-tun nan. ¶i si-s…ô-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-ńßu ¶aaj kad…ôm, pa ¶i ¶i…ôn nida ¶i aj-d…ô- ¶ia papatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶i …ô-sa-b…ô-r~…ĺa a wawa nida ¶i r~…ĺin-tun nan, sadikudaj satu pa ¶i ¶i…ôn nida ku tatajnaan a wawa ¶i adidiaj kaj-s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺin pakasia ¶awa tu mar~…ĺawa ¶uaj nu udipan ¶i r~…ĺin-tun nan. ¶aaj kat…ôn…ôs mapataj nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶i aj-d…ô- ¶ia , u zajsaŇč atu ńßua-m…ô ti…ôn- ¶un mar~…ĺa wawa tu nu mar~…ĺ…ôkakaaj ku zajsaŇč ¶i r~…ĺin-tun na, ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs mapataj tu ¶i r~…ĺin-tun , sadikudaj satu zajsan tajda tu ¶i si-s…ô-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-ńßu an, ¶i adidiaj kaj-s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺin pur~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan tu i kaaŇči ¶an a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° an. ma Ē~ °d…ôm tu namidis, nika u bar~…ĺu ¶u nida mańßi ¶aaj aniuju, kutkut…ôn nida ku r~…ĺun…ôm ni kaj-s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺin , maŇčar~…ĺaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdi Ē~ ° tu atu ¶inida, sadikudaj satu ¶aaj tu kan ¶aaj tu nanum, mapatj nu Ňčar~…ĺaj pataj satu. ju amapatj ¶inida, ku mitan…ôŇč ¶inida mipur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu ¶i adidi Ē~ °aj kaj-s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺin atu ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺi-tun tuni kasasumidaŇčan. nika ina tatusaaj nika sasuŇčaajan mańß…ôm…ôk ¶inida, ¶i si-s…ô-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-ńßu makajda i udip nida makaadińß tu udip nida atu ¶i kaj-s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺin a adiŇču. ¶i si-s…ô-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-ńßu mapataj satu, ¶i adidiaj kaj-s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺin atu ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺi-tun mir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj tu buju a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu umańß a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a kawawan, nu naajawaj ¶aaj kaw kapańßaj ani ka sasuŇčajan itini nu ajdaaj paka…ô Ē~ °d…ôm…ôn ku nuńß…ôni. patinsuan "kaaŇči ¶an a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° "kasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nu kapańßaj a aadińßan tu ¶udad, itini nar~…ĺimaan, mipur~…ĺuŇč tu ajdaaj a kawaw , nikasasumidaŇčan a kawaw , kar~…ĺa tat…ôtat…ôŇčaan a kawaw tuir~…ĺir~…ĺisaj nu nar~…ĺimaan. dumasatu sa ¶iwa ¶iwar~…ĺiw bijar~…ĺaw sa kina kakunkuan, nipatid…ôn tu tad…ômaw, mańßida nu mita ku iŇčkuo nijaduaj anikaudip, sasuŇčaaj nu tar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaan, tawjaaj nu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku siwa (**) a s…ô ¶ian nu pi ¶id…ôkan a r~…ĺikisi, mir~…ĺijas tu tukaj nu r~…ĺuma anikaudip namaka ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj anika ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺawan. tawja, nina ¶uda nikajdaan tu nar~…ĺimaan anisur~…ĺitan, saŇčaŇčiwŇčaŇčiw ńßan kinipipatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺim…ôkan tu "nipib…ôr~…ĺińß tu sakaj r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° " , mańßida u ńßua-m…ô ti…ôn- ¶un nu mikai i tawan atu ¶aaj pir~…ĺińßida i tawan, kaaŇči ¶an a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mar~…ĺar~…ĺib…ôt nikanaian nu zunziw. dumasa tu, ¶udad miar~…ĺa tu jadańßaj nu nar~…ĺimaan a kawaw, tańßs…ôpi ńßananaj nu kawaw, pakunida sananaj anipaadińßan sa. i tini nu kakunkuan nu ¶udad, misuajaw tu r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ni sur~…ĺitan idaw ku saka…ôtiman a kawawan, misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw misur~…ĺit tu pi ¶id…ôkan a bar~…ĺu ¶u nu wajwaj, namaka bar~…ĺu ¶uaj a r~…ĺawr~…ĺaw atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ anika bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan nipisur~…ĺitan, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu tad…ômaw atu r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńßan. nina kunku ńßan misuajaw tu ¶udad anipisur~…ĺitan tu masasuŇčaaja a kawawan, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a nijaduaj a kur~…ĺitan. aniwjuan nu r~…ĺanur~…ĺanuan a dińß…ôp, bar~…ĺińßnawan nu tunduńß a buju, kap…ôr~…ĺp…ôr~…ĺan nu bar~…ĺi atu udad nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, ¶u…ôd…ôtaj a bar~…ĺi, at…ôkakaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, wajwaj pakatin…ôŇč tu aniwju tu r~…ĺar~…ĺum nu pi ¶id…ôkan a katar~…ĺawan a …ôd…ôs nu r~…ĺunmuwa. . itini i ¶uda, r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u sakaj tatajna atu tatama nu sapir~…ĺar~…ĺiwan tu adada Ē~ ° nu katajdaan a ńßańßinaŇčan, atu ¶aajan kasasuadińß nu r~…ĺuma, mip…ôn…ô ¶ tu r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a wajwajan nu kapańßaj anika sasuajawan. namakajiniaj a nasur~…ĺitan
S.FORM: kaangican a luma' (nu Hulam a kamu: ŚíÜŚďģŚĪĪŤéä) kakungkuan kunku nina cudad itini i sabaw tu walu (18) a seci nu Ing-kelan amis a ye-ke'cun a niyaduan, namakaydaay i tukaya a sining ci Luo-ke-wude mi'suyi tu lanulanuan a hua-mey tien-cun , mididaw cinida tu silumaay a tademaw ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu an, maadih nida ku ni culimekan i labu nu kaangican a luma a kawaan: kaangican a luma nu naayaway a silumaay a tawki ci Law-En-sia (ŤÄĀśĀ©ŤāĖ Earnshaw) kina cacay tayda i Li-wu-pu mikawaw, patalumaen nida ku cacaya caay kaw kakatinengan a tatamaan a tademaw ci CI-pu-say a wawaan, pangangan han nida ci Si-se-keli (ŚłĆśĖĮŚÖčťáĆŚ§ę Heathcliff). (Hindley) . ina tatamaan a wawa alawen nida ku tawki nu namuh i sakakaay nida wawa ci Sin-de-la (ŤĺõŚĺ∑ťõ∑ Hindley) atu tataynaan a wawa ci Kay-se'-lin tu bulah, hamaw sa kalingesan ni Sin-de-la , nika masasungaay cinida atu ci Kay-se'-lin . mapatay satu ci Law-En-sia , ci Sin-de-la atu acawa nida ci Falan-sise miduduc tina luma'an , mangalay paculi, pala kalungen nida ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu , sawni sawacuen nida. ci Kay-se'-lin amica kuni ka namuh ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu an, nika mangalay cinida paka adih tu katuuday caay pisainai cinidaan, siacawa satu cinida tu siidaay a tademaw, malakapahay a hua-mey tien-cun a tawki ci Ay-de-cia.Lin-tun (śĄõŚĺ∑Śä†¬∑śěóť†ď Edgar Linton), ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu i kabalangbangan udaudadan nu labii malinges cinida liyasa tu. tulu satu amihcaan, ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu tayniaca i kaangican a luma' ,mala kakitaan tu u siidaay tu a tademaw cinida, pabalucu cinida mangalay misawacu miedis ci Sin-de-la atu mialaway tu kanamuhan numaku a tademaw ci Ay-de-cia an. sayaway hanipipakiyawen nida ku kawaw sapialaw tu zaysang ni Sin-de-la atu kaangican a luma' , pahabayan nida ku wawa ni Sin-de-la pala makatalay a tademaw, sainaiay nu laheci a kalungan nu tademaw. satu, pacebaan nida ku saba ni Ay-de-cia ci E-sa-bey-la Isabella) masungay milaliw, pakalinges ci Lin-tun nan amalekaka tu nika caay kasasukapah. ci Ay-de-cia atu ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu tuni kasasuada'an mangalepmangalep, utiih satu ku balucu' ni Kay-se'-lin , tada adada tu ku balucu' nida sadikuday mulecuh satu wawa cinida patay satu ipilecuhan, lutungay satu ci adidi'ay Kay-se'-lin ku maudipay. ci E-sa-bey-la namikikung satu caay pakadungdung tunipi sawaan, milaliw taydan nida i tukay mulecuh tu tatamaan a wawa ci Lin-tun nan. ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu caay kadem, pacicien nida ci Ay-de-cia papatahekal tu ci E-sa-bey-la a wawa nida ci Lin-tun nan, sadikuday satu pacicien nida ku tataynaan a wawa ci adidiay Kay-se'-lin pakasiacawa tu malawacuay nu udipan ci Lin-tun nan. caay katenes mapatay nu imelang ci Ay-de-cia , u zaysang atu hua-mey tien-cun mala wawa tu nu malekakaay ku zaysang ci Lin-tun na, caay ka tenes mapatay tu ci Lin-tun , sadikuday satu zaysan tayda tu ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu an, ci adidiay Kay-se'-lin pulul han tu i kaangican a luma' an. ma'dem tu namidis, nika u balucu nida mahicaay aniuyu, kutkuten nida ku lunem ni Kay-se'-lin , mangalay malaledi' tu atu cinida, sadikuday satu caay tu kan caay tu nanum, mapaty nu ngalay patay satu. yu amapaty cinida, ku mitaneng cinida mipulu' tu ci adidi'ay Kay-se'-lin atu ci Ha-li-tun tuni kasasumidangan. nika ina tatusaay nika sasungaayan mahemek cinida, ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu makayda i udip nida makaadih tu udip nida atu ci Kay-se'-lin a adingu. ci Si-se-ke'-li-hu mapatay satu, ci adidiay Kay-se'-lin atu ci Ha-li-tun milaylay tu buyu a luma' atu umah a luma' a kawawan, nu naayaway caay kaw kapahay ani ka sasungayan itini nu aydaay pakae'demen ku nuheni. patinsuan "kaangican a luma' "kasilaculan nu kapahay a aadihan tu cudad, itini nalimaan, mipulung tu aydaay a kawaw , nikasasumidangan a kawaw , kala tatetatengaan a kawaw tuililisay nu nalimaan. dumasatu saciwaciwaliw biyalaw sa kina kakunkuan, nipatiden tu tademaw, mahida nu mita ku Ingkuo niyaduay anikaudip, sasungaay nu taleacawaan, tawyaay nu cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa (19) a secian nu picidekan a likisi, miliyas tu tukay nu luma anikaudip namaka hekalay anika calilawan. tawya, nina cuda nikaydaan tu nalimaan anisulitan, sangangiwngangiw han kinipipatahekal tu caculimekan tu "nipibelih tu sakay luma' " , mahida u hua-mey tien-cun nu mikai i tawan atu caay pilihida i tawan, kaangican a luma' malalibet nikanaian nu zunziw. dumasa tu, cudad miala tu yadahay nu nalimaan a kawaw, tahsepi hananay nu kawaw, pakunida sananay anipaadihan sa. i tini nu kakunkuan nu cudad, misuayaw tu lihalay ni sulitan idaw ku sakaetiman a kawawan, misulitay a tademaw misulit tu picidekan a balucu nu wayway, namaka balucuay a lawlaw atu hekal anika balangbangan nipisulitan, patahekal tu tademaw atu lihalay nu kalalitemuhan. nina kunku han misuayaw tu cudad anipisulitan tu masasungaaya a kawawan, patahekal tu bangcalay a niyaduay a kulitan. aniwyuan nu lanulanuan a dihep, balihnawan nu tunduh a buyu, kapelpelan nu bali atu udad nu hekal, cuedetay a bali, atekakay nu lala', wayway pakatineng tu aniwyu tu lalum nu picidekan a katalawan a edes nu lunmuwa. . itini i cuda, lihalay nu hekal u sakay tatayna atu tatama nu sapilaliwan tu adada' nu kataydaan a hahinangan, atu caayan kasasuadih nu luma, mipenec tu lihalay a waywayan nu kapahay anika sasuayawan. namakayiniay a nasulitan
S.PHON: kaaŇči ¶an a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° (nu ńßur~…ĺam a kamu: ****) kakuŇčkuan kunku nina ¶udad itini i sabaw tu war~…ĺu (**) a s…ô ¶i nu iŇč-k…ôr~…ĺan amis a j…ô-k…ô Ē~ ° ¶un a nijaduan, namakajdaaj i tukaja a siniŇč ¶i r~…ĺuo-k…ô-wud…ô mi Ē~ °suji tu r~…ĺanur~…ĺanuan a ńßua-m…ô ti…ôn- ¶un , mididaw ¶inida tu sir~…ĺumaaj a tad…ômaw ¶i si-s…ô-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-ńßu an, maadińß nida ku ni ¶ur~…ĺim…ôkan i r~…ĺabu nu kaaŇči ¶an a r~…ĺuma a kawaan: kaaŇči ¶an a r~…ĺuma nu naajawaj a sir~…ĺumaaj a tawki ¶i r~…ĺaw-…ôn-sia (*** …ôarnsńßaw) kina ¶a ¶aj tajda i r~…ĺi-wu-pu mikawaw, patar~…ĺuma…ôn nida ku ¶a ¶aja ¶aaj kaw kakatin…ôŇčan a tatamaan a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶i-pu-saj a wawaan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan nida ¶i si-s…ô-k…ôr~…ĺi (***** ńß…ôatńß ¶r~…ĺiff). r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mar~…ĺar~…ĺib…ôt nikanaian nu zunziw. dumasa tu, ¶udad miar~…ĺa tu jadańßaj nu nar~…ĺimaan a kawaw, tańßs…ôpi ńßananaj nu kawaw, pakunida sananaj anipaadińßan sa. i tini nu kakunkuan nu
